completion_summary: Accepted source-stable ef202b7 v0.4.1 evidence: 768/768 classic cells at 40 experiments with eight zero-invalid methods and Dev-only champions.
notes: The first 64-cell preflight exposed a shared flow-recipe coupling bug: generated run duration could be shorter than the configured effective residence time. Repair and source-bind the recipe compiler before reissuing the preflight; do not relax invalid-action or Safe-GP gates.
scope: Version classic Train/Dev evidence for the current backend without rewriting v0.4 history; add bounded worker controls and require a 64-cell preflight before any 768-cell rerun
